n: A Man Adrift, Part 7: A Meeting in the Dark

steps.t: Travelling separately, Belondor has asked you to meet Tabrím and himself in Umbar-môkh at a place in Tâkhdar; the Cellars, east of Tilmakhím.
You have arrived in Umbar-môkh, where you are to join Belondor in meeting with Tabrím. You should talk to Belondor.
You have arrived in Umbar-môkh, where you have joined Belondor and Tabrím. You should see what Tabrím has to say.
Tabrím has revealed that the Order of the Eagle knows that Azagath and Nakási were preparing to travel by land, not by sea. He put forth the Order's t…
